symptom_vector: pod kill with forceful pod termination and container killed

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: shippingservice-1 组件的 pod_processes 指标降至0.0，表明发生了Pod强制终止或驱逐
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到多个Pod的pod_processes、pod_cpu_usage、pod_network_transmit_packets等指标在02:10:32Z-02:10:33Z期间同时降至0.0，变化率均为2.0
Step 2: 分析shippingservice-1作为故障实例，其pod_processes指标归零表明进程终止，符合pod kill特征
Step 3: 确认日志中无应用层错误记录，符合Kubernetes强制终止Pod的静默特征，网络指标中断进一步验证了Pod生命周期异常

critical_checks.instruction: 检查Trace数据中frontend服务的请求分布是否出现异常，特别是对shippingservice的调用比例变化

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 请求量异常下降或归零
critical_checks.instruction: 检查shippingservice-1的request指标是否在故障时间段内异常下降

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 响应量异常下降或归零
critical_checks.instruction: 检查shippingservice-1的response指标是否在故障时间段内异常下降
